start.speaker: A Shining One
start.text: Welcome, pilgrim, to the supper of the Lamb. Look — these tables were set for you before the road ever began. The redeemed of every chapter are here: the ones Help pulled from the mire, the ones who stood at the trial, the ones the Promise freed from the dungeon. Come and be seated among them.
start.text_zh: 欢迎你，朝圣者，来赴羔羊的婚筵。看哪——这些席位，早在你上路之前就为你摆好了。历世历代蒙救赎的人都在这里：被「帮助」从泥潭里拉起来的、在受审之地站立的、被「应许」从牢狱中释放的。来，坐在他们中间罢。

choices.text: These are saints and martyrs. How can I sit at their table?
choices.text_zh: 这些都是圣徒和殉道者。我怎能坐在他们的席上？

choices.text: I know these faces — I met them on the road. Faithful is here. Hopeful... and so many more.
choices.text_zh: 这些面孔我认得——我在路上遇见过他们。忠信在这里。盼望……还有这许多许多人。

by_grace.speaker: A Shining One
by_grace.text: Not one at this table came by their own worth — every seat was bought by the Lamb. Eat, rest, and rejoice; but the feast is not the end. When you are ready, walk on to the throne. The King Himself is waiting to welcome you by name.
by_grace.text_zh: 这席上没有一个人是凭自己的功劳来的——每一个座位都是羔羊用重价买来的。吃罢，安歇罢，欢喜罢；但这筵席还不是终点。你预备好了，就往宝座那里去。君王亲自在那里，要按你的名字迎接你。

choices.text: Then I will go on — to see the King, and to worship Him who carried me all the way home.
choices.text_zh: 那我就往前去——去见君王，去敬拜那一路把我带回家的主。
